paper_title: MorphoMask: Bright-Field Organoid Instance Segmentation and Morphological Quantitative Analysis
key_contributions: Proposed WT-DPE: detail enhancement and cross-path fusion for small targets, subtle boundaries, and adherent regions.
Proposed SLAC: spatial orientation modeling for dense instance separation.
Integrated workflow: segmentation masks -> morphological indicators for organoid culture monitoring and automated phenotypic analysis.
